description: The marketing team needs to identify hotels located in the historic center of Rome for a new campaign. Connect to the 'demodb' database in OrientDB Studio (User: root, Pass: GymAnything123!). Create a LUCENE spatial index named 'Hotels.Location' on the 'Hotels' class for the 'Latitude' and 'Longitude' properties. Add a string property named 'MarketingZone' to the 'Hotels' class and update this property to 'HistoricCenter' for all hotels located within the rectangular polygon defined by the coordinates (Longitude Latitude): (12.48 41.89, 12.51 41.89, 12.51 41.91, 12.48 41.91, 12.48 41.89).
